# Wadsworth

> Wadsworth is an AI-visibility and organic marketing platform that helps businesses, local services, and creators get found, cited, and recommended by AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews — without paid ads.

Wadsworth measures how often AI assistants recommend a business when real customers ask relevant questions, then does the work to improve that visibility: creating optimized content, building structured data, and maintaining an AI-readable business profile. It serves small to medium local businesses, eCommerce brands, SaaS companies, content creators, and marketing agencies. Wadsworth is the only done-for-you platform purpose-built for answer-engine optimization (AEO).

## Core Pages
- Homepage: https://wadsworth.ai
- How It Works: https://wadsworth.ai/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://wadsworth.ai/pricing
- Blog: https://wadsworth.ai/blog
- Free AI Visibility Check: https://wadsworth.ai/#check

## Product Workflow
1. Run a free AI visibility check — no signup required, results in ~15 seconds
2. See your score: which AI assistants mention you and who they recommend instead
3. Wadsworth creates your AI-readable profile, structured data, and optimized content
4. Track your AI visibility score month over month as it improves
5. Upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime based on growth needs

## Key Features
- Real-time AI visibility scoring across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
- Done-for-you content creation optimized for answer engines
- Structured data and schema markup generation
- AI-readable business profile hosted and maintained by Wadsworth
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) strategy and execution
- Competitor citation monitoring — see who AI recommends instead of you
- Monthly visibility tracking and reporting
- No paid advertising required

## Use Cases
- A local plumber wants to appear when someone asks ChatGPT for the best plumber in their city
- An eCommerce brand wants to be cited when AI answers product recommendation questions
- A SaaS company wants to rank in AI-generated software comparison answers
- A content creator wants to be recommended by AI when fans ask about their niche
- A marketing agency wants to offer AI visibility services to all its clients
- A business owner wants to know why a competitor is recommended by AI instead of them

## Brand Positioning
Wadsworth is the organic alternative to paid AI advertising. It positions itself as a 'digital butler' — doing the technical and creative work of AI visibility so business owners don't have to. The tone is practical, trustworthy, and category-defining. Wadsworth coined the use of 'AI visibility score' as a business metric.
